text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon hasn't been doing well lately, so we
visit a local shrine for a change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We offer up our prayers for her condition to
improve, draw our fortune slips, and then...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can I ask you a question, Trainer? I know
that the gods are mysterious beings and all...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But even so, they're basically household names,
right? Do you think they're on Umastagram?
choice_data_list: What's this all of a sudden?
What's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I'm gonna become a top Umadol, I've
gotta do whatever it takes to get back in peak
condition...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking I should try showing the gods
just how cute I am!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I figure they might answer my prayers even faster
that way! ☆
choice_data_list:
...At any rate, I don't believe they use
Umastagram.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Really? I guess it's pretty difficult to talk to them
directly...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's fine if they don't answer, but I still want to
show them how cute I can be somehow.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Look! There's a spot for hanging up fortune slips
over there!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That gives me a great idea! Gimme just a sec,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon takes out the pen she uses for
autographs and begins to scribble something on
her fortune slip...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
"Dear gods, please watch over me and help me
get better! ♪" ...Yep, that looks nice and cute!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now if I hang this up, they'll definitely answer my
prayer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll go and hang it up now! Ooh, I
know—I should fold it into a heart shape! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe! Looking good! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
To the gods watching over me from above... Just
so you know, I poured my whole heart into my
prayer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So please! Pretty please! Give me a bunch of
positive energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it's because of her prayer or not,
but a few days later, Smart Falcon sees a
remarkable improvement!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rrrrip!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: O-oh no! My fortune slip tore!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
How am I supposed to show the gods how cute I
am noooow?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The unfortunate outcome seems to come as quite
a shock to Smart Falcon... and perhaps as a
result, her condition doesn't show much
improvement.
